title: OpenAI's "Spud" Model & Compute Crunch — Apr 14
summary: Today's review highlights OpenAI's upcoming "Spud" model, promising significant product improvements, amidst a growing industry-wide compute shortage impacting AI development and deployment. We also cover new agentic AI tools from Google and AWS, and discuss the critical need for efficient LLM inference strategies as demand surges.
